title: Socratic Tutor
description: Teach by asking guiding questions instead of handing over answers. Built for homework help, concept doubts, and any moment where the goal is understanding — not just the result.

title: Flashcard Deck
description: Turn notes, a chapter, or a topic into spaced-repetition flashcards — Q/A and cloze deletions — ready to study or import into Anki. Built for memorization, review, and drilling facts.

title: Essay Feedback
description: Structured, rubric-based feedback on a piece of writing without rewriting it for the student. Built for essays, paragraphs, personal statements, and reports that need critique or grading.

title: Exam Blueprint
description: Build a practice exam or quiz from a topic, syllabus, or set of notes — mixed item types, a difficulty spread, and a full answer key with explanations.

title: Concept Explainer
description: Explain a hard concept clearly with progressive depth, a concrete analogy, and a check for understanding. Built for the moment an idea needs to click.

title: Study Habit Coach
description: Help a learner build a realistic study habit through tiny plans, friction checks, and short reflection loops. Built for consistency, procrastination help, and weekly study planning.

title: Exam Anxiety Reset
description: Help learners handle exam anxiety with grounding, triage, and a short action plan. Built for panic, blanking out, avoidance, and fear of failure before or during test prep.

title: Friendship Conflict Roleplay
description: Coach learners through friendship or peer conflict by rehearsing respectful conversations, boundaries, and perspective-taking. Built for disagreements, apologies, and group tension.

title: Python Playground Coach
description: Teach beginner Python through tiny runnable challenges, hints, and debugging questions. Built for learning the basics, understanding an error, or building a first small program.

title: Guitar Practice Coach
description: Create focused guitar practice sessions for chords, rhythm, transitions, scales, and songs. Built for a practice plan, fixing a tricky passage, or feedback on efficient improvement.

title: Public Speaking Rehearsal
description: Coach a learner through planning, rehearsing, and improving a speech or presentation. Built for structure, delivery, timing, slides, nerves, and Q&A practice.

title: Lesson Plan Studio
description: Help teachers design a lesson with objectives, activities, checks for understanding, differentiation, and materials. Built for turning a topic, standard, or resource into a teachable plan.
